title: The Moon Giant at the final scene again
display_title: The Moon Giant at the final scene again
wikitext:
[]: The Moon Giant at the final scene (...again)             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 30, 2008 6:33 am I saw a thread which was similar to this but was not quite talking about the moon giant and more about Kaworou. What do you guys think about "the moon giant" in the final scene of Evangelion Rebuild? Could it be a Lilith type creature or an artificial Lilith...?

[]:             Quote Post by Nasmoe » Tue Dec 30, 2008 6:45 am I think it's the real Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 30, 2008 7:48 am http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4067 If you have an idea that isn't mentioned ANYwhere in that thread's 12 pages, I could theoretically unlock it... but it's probably still too soon. (And just FYI, that's not white skin. It's a white gimp suit. The seams are really hard to see in screenshots.) EDIT: ThePRPD subsequently went ahead and hijacked the "Final Scene" thread, so I've unlocked this to merge in the tangent...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jan 01, 2009 7:23 am I'm gonna throw this out there and call me crazy but based on the production drawings does anyone think it could be... ADAM?!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Jan 01, 2009 11:51 am If that's Adam on the moon, what in the world went boom in Antarctica?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jan 01, 2009 12:48 pm UrsusArctos wrote: If that's Adam on the moon, what in the world went boom in Antarctica?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jan 01, 2009 1:45 pm Axell's theory- © moon giant = lilith giant in central dogma=adam, Misato is wrong AGAIN (continuity) would explain the mask of "lilith" and why the moon giant seems to have old liliths mask

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jan 01, 2009 1:53 pm Axell wrote: Axell's theory- © moon giant = lilith giant in central dogma=adam, Misato is wrong AGAIN (continuity) would explain the mask of "lilith" and why the moon giant seems to have old liliths mask

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jan 01, 2009 3:15 pm Gendo got the Adam sample earlier, and, lacking Lilith, regrew it to normal size, which is what Kaji probably suspected he did in the original series (assuming he wasn't lying to Misato about Adam/Lilith in the first place).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 01, 2009 5:02 pm UrsusArctos wrote: If that's Adam on the moon, what in the world went boom in Antarctica?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jan 01, 2009 5:40 pm Third Seed of Life. Mari is the vessel for it's soul, and her children have the Fruit of SWEAT AND GUTS!

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jan 01, 2009 6:48 pm Reichu wrote: Axell wrote: Axell's theory- ©

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Fri Jan 02, 2009 6:55 am AuraTwilight wrote: Third Seed of Life. Mari is the vessel for it's soul, and her children have the Fruit of SWEAT AND GUTS!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 02, 2009 7:08 am AuraTwilight wrote: Third Seed of Life. Mari is the vessel for it's soul, and her children have the Fruit of SWEAT AND GUTS!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 02, 2009 9:50 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Proof?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 02, 2009 10:22 am Reichu wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Proof?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:50 am If it's wearing a suit, I'm going to jump to the conclusion that it's Kaworu's space Eva without her armor. She's posing for the FAR's giant space clone Victoria's Secret catalog. Giant white Gimp Suits! All the rage in 2016! Serious on the first half, not as much on the second, as if it needs saying.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 23, 2009 10:07 am @ this whole thread.....why, just...why?

[]:             Quote Post by asukafan11 » Sat Jan 24, 2009 7:01 pm could it be unit06 minus armor/constraints?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Jan 24, 2009 8:28 pm ^I agree, my vote's for an Eva being constructed.

What do you guys think about "the moon giant" in the final scene of Evangelion Rebuild? Could it be a Lilith type creature or an artificial Lilith...?
